title: Judith Ousting Minotaur
Quiet Morning
description: A still-life study painted at dawn, capturing the soft diffused light of early morning through a kitchen window. Loose brushwork and a muted palette evoke a sense of calm.

title: Garden Abstraction
description: An abstract response to summer blooms — layers of acrylic washes and textured marks dissolve the boundary between observation and imagination.

title: Coastal Reverie
description: Inspired by a morning walk along the shoreline, this plein-air study captures the movement of tide and mist using broad palette knife strokes.

title: Figure in Ochre
description: A figure study built from warm earth tones — raw sienna, yellow ochre, and burnt umber layered to suggest form through color rather than outline.

title: Resting Form
description: A long-pose charcoal study exploring weight and repose. The model was positioned in a reclined posture, allowing the drawing to focus on mass and contour.

title: Gesture Series 01
description: A collection of two-minute gesture drawings capturing quick motion and dynamic poses. Continuous line technique keeps the energy raw and immediate.

title: Torso Study
description: Academic torso study using three-value rendering to build volume. Graphite hatching follows the form to describe musculature and surface.

title: Portrait in Red Chalk
description: A portrait study rendered in sanguine chalk on toned paper, a technique referencing the Old Master tradition. Highlights are lifted with a kneaded eraser.

title: Standing Pose
description: A twenty-minute standing pose study exploring contrapposto and balance through simplified planes and directional light.

title: Morning Market
description: Documentary photography from a local farmers' market at opening hour. Shot on 35mm film, these images capture the ritual of commerce, color, and community.

title: Winter Light
description: A series exploring how January light falls through domestic windows, transforming everyday interiors into studies in geometry and shadow.

title: City at Dusk
description: Long-exposure street photography capturing the transition from day to night. Blurred figures and streaking headlights create an abstract quality within recognizable urban space.

title: Botanical Study
description: Close-up macro photography of dried flowers and foliage. Shallow depth of field and natural window light turn organic textures into near-abstract compositions.

title: Bloom Brand Identity
description: Full brand identity system for a botanical skincare startup. Includes logo, type hierarchy, color palette, packaging mockups, and brand guidelines document.

title: Aperture Magazine Layout
description: Editorial layout design for a photography and culture magazine. Emphasis on grid fluidity, typographic hierarchy, and image-to-text balance across twelve spreads.

title: Arts Festival Poster
description: Event poster series for an annual arts festival. The visual system uses hand-drawn letterforms combined with photographic textures to bridge analog and digital aesthetics.

title: Typography Specimen
description: A self-initiated type specimen exploring the personality and range of a custom variable font. Designed as both a functional reference and a visual showcase.
